title: The Yield Partnership: Intel and PDF Solutions Tackle Advanced Nodes - Semiwiki
gist: Daniel Nenni examines the July-2025 Intel-PDF Solutions (NASDAQ: PDFS) collaboration on advanced-node yield, arguing Intel's historical yield struggles since 14nm FinFET, the new complexity of 18A's RibbonFET/PowerVia, and data-explosion at advanced nodes make AI-driven yield analytics (PDF's Exensio platform) as critical to foundry success as the process technology itself.

insights.claim: Intel has struggled with yield since the 14nm FinFET process nodes, a problem the author traces to the IDM-era culture of secrecy and siloed knowledge.
insights.speaker: Daniel Nenni
insights.so_what: Frames yield as a long-standing structural Intel weakness; the willingness to bring in outside help is itself a signal of cultural change at Intel Foundry.
insights.quote: Intel has struggled with yield since the 14nm FinFET process nodes.
insights.locator: One of the most difficult things to do in life is ask for help.

insights.claim: In July 2025 Intel and PDF Solutions announced a collaboration, with CEOs Lip-Bu Tan and John Kibarian sharing a stage and reportedly managing the projects directly, indicating an active executive-level relationship.
insights.speaker: Daniel Nenni
insights.so_what: CEO-level direct management signals strategic priority; a deepening Intel relationship is a potential revenue and credibility catalyst for PDFS.
insights.quote: Lip-Bu Tan and John Kibarian shared a stage and clearly have an active executive-level business relationship through Intel Foundry and PDF Solutions.
insights.locator: In July of 2025, Intel and PDF Solutions announced a collaboration...

insights.claim: PDF Solutions (NASDAQ: PDFS) is positioned as the #1 yield expert, with 18 of the top 20 semiconductor companies having worked with it, and its Exensio platform unifies equipment, metrology, inspection, test, and design data to accelerate root-cause analysis.
insights.speaker: Daniel Nenni
insights.so_what: Quantifies PDFS's entrenched market position; 18/20 penetration plus a unifying analytics platform underpins the durable-moat case for the stock.
insights.quote: 18 out of the top 20 semiconductor companies have worked with PDF.
insights.locator: On the inside PDF Solutions is the #1 yield expert...

insights.claim: Yield learning has become exponentially harder at advanced nodes because RibbonFET gate-all-around transistors and PowerVia backside power delivery (both introduced with Intel 18A) create new integration challenges and dramatically increase manufacturing data, rendering traditional statistical process control insufficient.
insights.speaker: Daniel Nenni
insights.so_what: Establishes the structural demand driver for AI-driven analytics; node complexity is the secular tailwind for yield-management software vendors like PDFS.
insights.quote: Traditional statistical process control methods are no longer sufficient to identify the subtle interactions that can impact yield at these levels of complexity.
insights.locator: Yield learning has become exponentially more difficult...

insights.claim: Yield is critical for Intel 18A-P because the node must simultaneously serve Intel's own products and Intel Foundry customers, who require confidence in predictable performance, quality, and volume before committing.
insights.speaker: Daniel Nenni
insights.so_what: Yield is the gating factor for Intel Foundry's external-customer credibility; track 18A-P yield as the key indicator of foundry-business viability.
insights.quote: Achieving competitive yields is essential not only for cost reduction but also for demonstrating foundry credibility.
insights.locator: For Intel 18A-P, yield learning is particularly critical...

insights.claim: The author argues for the 14A node data-driven yield optimization will become a foundational requirement rather than a competitive advantage, and that semiconductor leadership is no longer determined solely by transistor innovation but by the ability to analyze manufacturing data at scale.
insights.speaker: Daniel Nenni
insights.so_what: If analytics becomes table-stakes at 14A, the yield-software TAM expands across all leading-edge foundries, not just Intel — broadly bullish for the category.
insights.quote: semiconductor leadership is no longer determined solely by transistor innovation. Success increasingly depends on the ability to collect, analyze, and act upon manufacturing data at unprecedented scale.
